网络USB设备远程访问解决方案

Network USB Device Remote Access Solution

完全用户空间运行 • 静态编译 • 无需依赖库

Entirely Userspace • Statically Compiled • No Dependencies

⚠️ 试用版限制

⚠️ Trial Version Limitation

试用版只能连接一个USB设备

Trial version can only connect to one USB device

📄 License Information

授权文件请放置在数据目录的 data 文件夹下

Please place license file in the data directory under data folder

客户端配置 Client Configuration

在VirtualHere客户端中添加以下服务器地址：

Add the following server address in VirtualHere client:

💡 在客户端的"指定集线器"功能中粘贴此地址 💡 Paste this address in the client's "Specify Hubs" feature

产品简介 Product Overview

VirtualHere USB Server 实现了通过网络远程访问USB设备。服务器完全运行在用户空间， 因此比基于内核的解决方案更加稳定。VirtualHere 是第一家创建完全用户空间USB服务器的公司。 无需编译或内核模块，现在 VirtualHere 再次创新！服务器完全静态编译， 服务器端完全不需要任何Linux运行时库！服务器可以作为纯控制台守护进程运行，便于集成到运行级脚本中。 诊断消息输出到系统日志。

The VirtualHere USB Server enables remote access to USB devices over a network. The server runs entirely in userspace, therefore it is inherently more stable than kernel based solutions. VirtualHere was the first company to create this entirely userspace USB server. No compilation or kernel modules are required, and now VirtualHere has innovated again! The server is entirely statically compiled, no linux run-time libraries are required at all on the server! The server can be run as a console only daemon, for easy integration into run-level scripts. Diagnostic messages are output to syslog.

OEM集成优势 OEM Integration Benefits

VirtualHere 非常适合OEM集成，因为：

VirtualHere is perfect for OEM integration because:

🔧 自带设备支持

🔧 Bring Your Own Device

将任何基于Linux的设备变成USB服务器！例如树莓派0/1/2/3/4/5、桌面电脑、路由器、交换机、刀片服务器或您的定制PCB！您可以选择最具成本效益和适合的硬件。

Turn any linux based device into a USB Server! E.g raspberry pi0/1/2/3/4/5, desktop, router, switch, blade server or your custom pcb! You choose the most cost effective and suitable hardware for your use.

🛡️ 用户空间运行

🛡️ Entirely Userspace

这比基于内核的解决方案更稳定且更容易更新。在用户空间运行意味着任何服务器问题都不会导致整个服务器设备崩溃。

This is much more stable and easy to update than kernel based solutions. Running in userspace means that any server problems do not crash the entire server device.

🌐 通用兼容性

🌐 Universal Compatibility

服务器完全自包含，将在任何版本的Linux内核和任何架构上运行！这使得OEM部署变得简单，除了基本的Linux内核外，服务器设备不需要任何其他东西。

The server is entirely self-contained, and will run on any version of the Linux Kernel, and on any architecture! This makes OEM deployment trivial, nothing else is required on the server device besides the basic linux kernel.

⚙️ 简单配置

⚙️ Simple Configuration

所有设置都存储在一个简单的文本文件中，自动生成合理的默认值 - 没有复杂的注册表设置

All settings are stored in a simple text file auto-generated with sensible defaults - no complicated registry settings

💰 性价比高

💰 Competitive Pricing

极具竞争力的单位成本

Very competitive per unit cost

🔄 持续更新

🔄 Active Development

积极的产品开发和频繁的修复/改进/更新（更新/错误修复免费！）

Active product development and frequent fixes/improvements/updates (Updates/bug fixes are free!)

技术特性 Technical Features

  • 单个服务器可共享多达122个设备，支持6层集线器深度
  • A single server can share up to 122 devices up to 6 hubs deep
  • 通过简单的bash脚本实现细粒度身份验证。轻松创建或连接到现有的身份验证后端
  • Allows fine-grained authentication using simple bash scripting. Easily create or connect to your existing authentication backend
  • 支持安全套接字层(SSL)，在通过互联网共享时提供更好的窃听保护
  • Supports Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) for better protection from eavesdroppers when sharing over the Internet
  • 通过简单脚本轻松解决设备问题
  • Easily work around device quirks through simple scripting
  • 使用开放的Bonjour协议在网络上广播其服务，允许客户端自动发现服务器
  • Uses the open Bonjour protocol to broadcast its services on the network, this allows clients to auto-find servers
  • 所有USB通信都在单个TCP端口(7575)上进行，使防火墙和远程访问设置变得非常容易，操作无需互联网访问
  • All USB communications take place on a single TCP port (7575) making it very easy to setup firewall and remote access, and NO internet access required for operation
  • 新功能：现在支持VirtualHere EasyFind系统，无需网络设置，可从任何地方连接到您的服务器！
  • NEW: Now supports the VirtualHere EasyFind System no network setup needed, connect to your server from anywhere!
  • IPv6支持
  • IPv6 support
  • 客户端可以作为服务运行，并通过易于使用的API进行控制，任何人都可以使用
  • The client can run as a service and is controllable via an easy to use API that anyone can use
  • 客户端是单个可执行文件，无依赖项
  • The client is a single executable file with no dependencies
  • 可以为您的特定CPU架构进行定制编译
  • Can be custom compiled for your specific CPU architecture
